---
Title: "Data Exploration"
Author: "Gavin Cassidy
format: html
---


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(here)
```



```{r}
skaters <- read.csv(here("data/skaters.csv"))
```

```{r}
siblings <- read.csv(here("data/siblings.csv"))

siblings_full <- siblings |> pivot_longer(cols = c(sib1, sib2, sib3, sib4, sib5, sib6), names_to = "sib", values_to = "sibling", values_drop_na = TRUE)
```



```{r}
skaters_wsib <- left_join(skaters, siblings_full, by = join_by(player == sibling))
```



```{r}
has_sib <- skaters_wsib |> filter(!is.na(id))
no_sib <- skaters_wsib |> filter(is.na(id))
```

## Plot 1
```{r}
g_a_sib <- has_sib |> group_by(id, family) |> summarise(tot_G = sum(G), tot_A = sum(A))

has_sib |> group_by(id, family) |> summarise(tot_G = sum(G), tot_A = sum(A)) |> arrange(desc(tot_A))

ggplot(data = g_a_sib, aes(x = tot_G, y = tot_A)) +
    geom_point()
```
